text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara sets her sights on the Twinkle Series. Her goal is to place first in literally any race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she constantly loses focus and often
ditches training to go have fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will the carefree Haru Urara even be able to train
at this rate, let alone get first place?
